evals.prompt: Plan the UI skeleton for a new marketing landing page for a B2B SaaS product.
evals.expected_output: A landing-page skeleton with global nav/footer, section order, max widths, section padding, hero behavior, responsive rules, and reusable primitives.

evals.prompt: Architect the initial dashboard layout for a project management app.
evals.expected_output: A dashboard shell plan with sidebar/header/main dimensions, CSS variables, responsive drawer behavior, and reuse of existing components.

evals.prompt: This repo already has shadcn/ui installed. Plan the skeleton for a settings area without duplicating primitives.
evals.expected_output: A system-aware plan that inventories shadcn/ui components, reuses primitives, and adds only missing composites/layout shells.
